title: Migration Companion Plan
description: User-facing plan produced by the ~6-question interview. The empirical probe consumes this and produces a report + workflow.yaml.

name.description: Human-friendly run label. Must be RFC-1123 compatible (a-z0-9-). Max 40 chars so composite CR names fit under 253 chars.

version.description: Upstream version string e.g. '7.10.2', '8.11', '2.4.0', '9.3.0'. Used to select RFS source handler.

endpoint.description: Live HTTP(S) endpoint. Omit or leave empty for BYOS (Bring Your Own Snapshot) mode.

allowInsecure.description: When true, MA disables TLS cert verification against the source cluster. Dev-only.

secretName.description: Name of a k8s Secret with 'username' and 'password' keys. Required when mode=basic.

snapshot.description: Either take a fresh snapshot (live mode) or point at an existing one (BYOS).

repoUri.description: s3://bucket/path to the snapshot repo root

s3Endpoint.description: S3 endpoint URL — LocalStack in dev, omit for real AWS

name.description: Snapshot name. MUST be RFC-1123 (no underscores!) because MA builds CR names like source1.target1.<snapshotName>.migration-0.<stage>

alreadyExists.description: If true -> BYOS (don't re-snapshot). If false/absent -> take one.

indices.description: Index patterns to include in snapshot. Defaults to ['*'].

mode.description: v1 supports backfill + metadata. Live-capture (Kafka/proxy/replayer) is deferred.

gates.description: How to handle MA ApprovalGates (evaluatemetadata / migratemetadata / vapretry).

autoApprove.description: If true, companion patches phase=Approved as soon as gate enters Initialized. If false, user is prompted per gate.

sampleSize.description: Max docs per index to migrate in the dry-run. 0 = all.
